title: Add restaurant registration system with name, address, menu pricing, and images

requirements.text: Extend the backend Restaurant type to include an address field (text) and update all sample data initialization to include addresses for existing restaurants

quotes: register new hotels/restaurants with their name and address

acceptanceCriteria: Restaurant type includes an address field
All existing sample restaurants have address values populated
Address is returned in restaurant queries

requirements.text: Create a backend function to register new restaurants with name, address, logo URL, cuisine type, opening hours, and average preparation time, returning the newly created restaurant with a generated ID

quotes: option to register new hotels/restaurants with their name and address

acceptanceCriteria: Function accepts restaurant registration details including name and address
Function generates unique restaurant ID
Function returns the created restaurant object
New restaurant is persisted and appears in restaurant listings

requirements.text: Create a restaurant registration form page accessible to authenticated users with input fields for restaurant name, address, logo URL, cuisine type, opening hours, and average preparation time
acceptanceCriteria: Registration form is accessible via navigation or dedicated route
Form includes validation for required fields
Form requires user authentication to access
Successful registration redirects to the new restaurant's page or shows confirmation

requirements.text: Update the RestaurantCard component to display the restaurant address beneath the cuisine type

quotes: that can be browse and accessed by user or visitors

acceptanceCriteria: Address is visible on each restaurant card in the listing
Address formatting is consistent with the visual theme
Address text is readable and properly truncated if too long

requirements.text: Add a backend function to associate menu items with prices (already part of MenuItem type) and visual image URLs to a specific restaurant, allowing registration of menu items with name, description, price, category, food type, preparation time, availability, and image URL
acceptanceCriteria: Function accepts restaurant ID and menu item details including price and image URL
Menu items are linked to the correct restaurant
Added menu items appear in restaurant menu queries

requirements.text: Update the MenuItemCard component to display menu item images using the image URL from the backend, showing a placeholder if no image is provided
acceptanceCriteria: Menu item cards display images when image URLs are available
Placeholder image is shown when no image URL exists
Images maintain aspect ratio and fit within card layout
Image loading states are handled gracefully

requirements.text: Create a menu item management interface for restaurant owners to add menu items with name, description, price, category, food type, preparation time, availability toggle, and image URL after registering their restaurant
acceptanceCriteria: Interface is accessible only to the restaurant owner who registered it
Form validates all required fields including price
Successfully added items appear in the restaurant's menu immediately
Category and food type are selectable from predefined options

constraints: Use the existing single-actor Motoko backend architecture
Maintain the Restaurant and MenuItem type structures with additive changes only
Preserve the existing visual theme with warm, food-themed colors
Do not modify read-only frontend paths: useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, and components/ui
nonGoals: Real payment processing for restaurant registration fees
Email or SMS verification for restaurant owners
Advanced restaurant owner dashboards with analytics

required: Restaurant registration form banner showing a welcoming restaurant interior with warm lighting (restaurant-register-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Menu item upload placeholder icon showing a plate with utensils in warm orange tones (menu-upload-icon.dim_256x256.png)
